end,function(M,D)local J=R(D)local G=function(G,j,k,y,c,h)return d(M,{G;j,k,y;c;h},D,J)end return G end return(f(364739-(-587415),{}))(J(c))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or
